title: Are They Hiding Aliens at S4?
summary: This interview discusses claims about underground military bases allegedly housing extraterrestrial beings, with specific focus on the S4 facility near Area 51. The guest claims to have spoken with people who were present during interviews with non-human beings at S4.

acronyms.definition: A US Air Force installation in Nevada that oversees the Nevada Test and Training Range

key_claims.claim: Extraterrestrial beings are held in American underground military bases
The beings have been interviewed by personnel at S4
The guest spoke with people who were present during interviews with the beings at S4
S4 is located approximately 15 miles south of Area 51
Nellis Air Force Base confirmed the existence of multiple locations called S4 on the range but would not disclose locations or activities
A facility at Papoose was built into the side of a mountain and dirt roads are visible in old satellite photos
